def min_coins(amount, coins):
if not coins or coins[0] > amount:
include_coin = min_coins(amount - coins[0], coins) + 1
exclude_coin = min_coins(amount, coins[1:])
return min(include_coin, exclude_coin)

### Task Description 9: Implement a memoization algorithm to solve the knapsack problem.
def knapsack(weights, values, capacity):
if i == len(weights) or weight > capacity:
include = values[i] + dp(i+1, weight - weights[i])
exclude = dp(i+1, weight)
return max(include, exclude)
